name: The Green Elder
description: A grove-tier Meme Tree, one of 25. An ancient mossy elder rests at the heart of the forest, patient and amused - it has seen every meme grow and fall and grow again. 100% of the $20 mint became permanent WATER backing in the Water vault. Every harvest, half its yield grows the tree and half buys Meme for Trees for whoever owns it. The backing is permanent and can never be withdrawn - this is an art purchase with a living yield feature, not a deposit. Rewards are yield-funded meme token drops; their value varies with the market and nothing is guaranteed.
